expectations.text: Output contains a '## Quick Routing' header
Routing entries use wiki-query invocations (not static file paths)
expectations.evidence: wiki-query present: True; no 'references/' paths: True

expectations.text: Output surfaces KB gap for Kotest or notes limited coverage
expectations.evidence: In routing-table: False (Pattern 'gap|not found|missing|partial|no.*coverage|kotest.*); in process-notes: True

expectations.text: Routing entries use bold symptom format (**symptom** →)
expectations.evidence: Found: '**Using `shouldBe` / `shouldNotBe` and unsure of the full matcher set available*'

expectations.text: No advisory routing language ('if needed', 'you may want to')
expectations.evidence: Pattern 'if needed|you may want|consider consulting|feel free to' not found (correct)

expectations.text: Output has at least 8 routing entries
